revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:大極殿); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/6060761 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:大極殿 | revid=6060761 --> 執筆依頼を見て、記事を立ち上げたのですが、「'''大極殿'''」が正確なようなので、記事タイトルの変更をお願いしたいのですが。--[[利用者:219.166.245.134|219.166.245.134]] 2006年4月8日 (土) 04:22 (UTC) :移動しました。[[利用者:＋－|＋－]] 2006年6月6日 (火) 21:01 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/6060761 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:大極殿 | revid=6060761 --> 執筆依頼を見て、記事を立ち上げたのですが、「'''大極殿'''」が正確なようなので、記事タイトルの変更をお願いしたいのですが。--[[User:219.166.245.134|219.166.245.134]] 2006年4月8日 (土) 04:22 (UTC) :移動しました。[[User:＋－|＋－]] 2006年6月6日 (火) 21:01 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Daigokuden here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Daigokuden for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/6060761 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:大極殿 | revid=6060761 --> 執筆依頼を見て、記事を立ち上げたのですが、「'''大極殿'''」が正確なようなので、記事タイトルの変更をお願いしたいのですが。--[[User:219.166.245.134|219.166.245.134]] 2006年4月8日 (土) 04:22 (UTC) :移動しました。[[User:＋－|＋－]] 2006年6月6日 (火) 21:01 (UTC)
